title: Fresh Linen Fragrance Oil 100ml | Luxury and Designer Scents | Highly Concentrated | Perfect for Candles, Soaps, Bath Bombs, Diffusers, Wax Melts | UK Made | Vegan (Fresh Linen, 100ml (Pack of 1))
features: ⭐ Fragrance Description: A fresh, clean fragrance reminiscent of fluffy towels combining floral notes of freesia, jasmine, lily, and orchid leading to a heart of regal iris and mimosa, supported on a base of velvet woods, sandalwood and amber. ⭐
💪 Strong Scent ! Various sizes available for all your needs. 💪

🌿 Vegan Friendly Products! 🐇 Not tested on Animals! 👑Proudly made and bottled in the UK to current EU Regulations. Full regulatory information can be provided upon request. Our Fragrances are suitable for private or small business reselling their products on the UK market.
📋 Full technical support. Safety Data Sheets, IFRA, CLP, Allergen Declaration available upon request. 📋
🏭 We are small family run business located near the Peak District in the UK. Our items are made to order and bottled by hand. 🏭

📃 How to use: Our fragrance oils are highly concentrated have been formulated for use in soaps, candles, bath bombs, oil burners, diffusers, sprays, and both skin and hair care items. Do not use on skin undiluted. Our fragrances are not suitable for suitable for lip products📃
description: Product description Luxury and inspired fragrances. Our version has been manufactured to our specifications. It has been made to the highest quality and strongest concentration on the market. Please note: This fragrance cannot be used in lip products. Vegan Friendly Products. These fragrances are Not Test on Animals! These oils are completely synthetic and should not be confused with essential oils. Full MSDS's, CLP, IFRA & Allergen Declaration supporting information can be supplied on request. Directions The fragrance oil is highly concentrated and has been formulated for use in soaps, candles, bath bombs, oil burners, diffusers, sprays, and both skin and hair care items. Do not use on skin undiluted. The fragrance is not suitable for lip products. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not use undiluted on skin or in lip products. See more
